item.title: Next season already? Our Way-Too-Early NFL Power Rankings stack all 32 teams for 2026
item.description: After the conclusion of the 2025 NFL season, how do all 32 teams stack up for 2026?

item.title: Ranked: The top 25 manager jobs in soccer, from best to worst
item.description: Most of soccer's top coaching jobs will be vacant in the next year or so. Let's rank which jobs are the most -- and least -- attractive, from clubs to...

item.title: Liverpool at a crossroads: Where it has gone wrong for Slot since Premier League title
item.description: It's been a rough season for Arne Slot and Liverpool -- but is it already too late for them to turn the tide?

item.title: Luka hasn't made the Lakers a title contender, yet: Here's what we've seen in 365 days
item.description: Let's revisit the first 365 days of the Luka Doncic era in Los Angeles and examine how the Lakers can return to championship contention.

item.title: What this NBA trade deadline revealed: Teams are finding new ways to tank
item.description: Much to the irritation of some league insiders, the trade deadline was more than just a flurry of moves.
